{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Archlord man
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Waybound (novel)|Waybound]]
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Archlord man]] has weathered, tar-black skin and gray hair.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
